description: Three composable generic services for a voice (or text) command pipeline. audio-to-text: mic + Google STT + wake-word trim, emits transcripts to a configured downstream. text-router: domain-agnostic string → DoCommand dispatcher with config-driven phrase table, optional spoken acknowledgment, optional LLM fallback — works for voice transcripts, chat, CLI, MQTT, anything. ai-responder: Anthropic Claude + TTS for freeform speech generation, also usable standalone to speak arbitrary text.
